Home›Services›Incident Response› BEC
Fraud Investigation

Business Email
Compromise Investigation

Business email compromise is the most financially devastating form of cybercrime. Our practice investigates BEC incidents, traces fraudulent transactions, identifies the full scope of account compromise, and implements controls to prevent recurrence.

Tracing the Attack. Recovering Control.

BEC attacks are sophisticated social engineering operations that exploit trust relationships within organizations. An attacker compromises or impersonates a legitimate email account — often a CEO, CFO, or vendor — and directs fraudulent wire transfers, diverts payroll, or steals sensitive data. By the time the fraud is discovered, significant financial damage has already occurred.

Our practice provides comprehensive BEC investigation services that go beyond simply securing the compromised account. We trace the full scope of the attack, identify all affected accounts and data, coordinate with financial institutions for fund recovery, and implement authentication and email security controls to prevent future attacks.

Investigation Process

  • Compromised account identification and immediate access revocation
  • Email header and metadata analysis to trace attacker activity
  • Mail flow rule and forwarding rule audit across the organization
  • Fraudulent transaction identification and financial institution coordination
  • Timeline reconstruction — when the attacker gained access and what they accessed
  • Credential harvesting method identification (phishing, password spray, token theft)
  • Multi-factor authentication deployment and enforcement
  • Email authentication implementation (DMARC, DKIM, SPF)
  • Vendor email fraud detection and supply chain email security
  • Employee awareness training for BEC recognition

Financial Recovery Coordination

Time is critical in BEC fund recovery. We coordinate with banking institutions, law enforcement, and legal counsel to maximize the probability of recovering fraudulently transferred funds. Our forensic documentation supports law enforcement investigations and civil recovery actions.

Who We Serve

Organizations that have discovered fraudulent wire transfers or invoice manipulation. CFOs and controllers investigating suspicious payment requests. Companies whose employee or customer data was accessed through email compromise. Insurance carriers investigating BEC claims.

BEC Capabilities

  • Account Compromise Analysis
  • Wire Fraud Investigation
  • Fund Recovery Coordination
  • Email Security Hardening
  • DMARC/DKIM/SPF Setup
  • MFA Implementation
  • Forensic Documentation

Suspected BEC Attack?

Contact your bank immediately, then contact us. Speed determines whether funds can be recovered.

Get Help Now
